title: repeated test preamble in evaluator
description: eval_header_test, eval_address_test, and eval_envelope_test all open with the same four lines: refs collection, extract_match_type, extract_comparator, casemap derivation. Suggested rewrite: extract struct TestArgs { mt, casemap, remaining } and fn extract_test_args(forms) -> TestArgs. Address-part tests additionally call extract_address_part on args.remaining.
